name: DM-10
note: Off-Meta BO6 Battle Rifle (7.62 NATO, semi-auto). Slot-Namen = generischer BO6-Pool, %-Deltas DM-10-spezifisch. reload_s roh '3233 s' (Dezimal-Span verloren) -> 3.23.
